initial_candidates.sql:
WITH product_sales_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        hp.division,
        hp.product_code,
        SUM(w.standard_qty + w.gloss_qty + w.poster_qty) AS total_qty_sold
    FROM web_orders w
    JOIN hardware_dim_product hp ON w.id = hp.product_code
    WHERE w.occurred_at BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND '2021-12-31'
    GROUP BY hp.division, hp.product_code
),
ranked_products AS (
    SELECT 
        division,
        product_code,
        total_qty_sold,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY division ORDER BY total_qty_sold DESC) AS rank
    FROM product_sales_2021
),
top_three_per_division AS (
    SELECT 
        division,
        total_qty_sold
    FROM ranked_products
    WHERE rank <= 3
)
SELECT 
    division,
    AVG(total_qty_sold) AS avg_qty_sold
FROM top_three_per_division
GROUP BY division;

WITH product_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.division,
        p.product_code,
        SUM(o.standard_qty + o.gloss_qty + o.poster_qty) AS total_qty_sold
    FROM web_orders o
    JOIN hardware_dim_product p ON o.id = p.product_code
    WHERE o.occurred_at BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND '2021-12-31'
    GROUP BY p.division, p.product_code
),
top_three_per_division AS (
    SELECT 
        division,
        product_code,
        total_qty_sold,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY division ORDER BY total_qty_sold DESC) AS rn
    FROM product_sales
),
top_three_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        division,
        AVG(total_qty_sold) AS avg_qty_sold
    FROM top_three_per_division
    WHERE rn <= 3
    GROUP BY division
)
SELECT 
    division,
    avg_qty_sold
FROM top_three_avg;

top_three_per_division AS (
    SELECT 
        division,
        product_code,
        total_qty_sold,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY division ORDER BY total_qty_sold DESC) AS rn
